results.title: HarnessBridge: A Learnable Bidirectional Controller for LLM Agents
results.content:
Introducing 'HarnessBridge', an agent-environmental interface module, to solve the problem of duplicate information accumulation and inefficient interaction that occurs during long-term work. HarnessBridge optimizes the flow of information using learnable bidirectional projection technology between large-scale language model (LLM) agents and environments. Specifically, observation projection reduces token usage by compressing the massive execution history into a core state, and action projection increases work efficiency by blocking unfounded suggestions and providing feedback. According to the results of the study, the system has shown excellent versatility while dramatically reducing token consumption compared to conventional manual design, maintaining or improving performance in a [...] manual design, maintaining or improving performance in a variety of models and environments. In conclusion, this paper presents a new paradigm that optimizes the agent interface through learned policies instead of fixed rules. [...] # HarnessBridge: A Learnable Bidirectional Controller for LLM Agents
## Research Paper Review

results.title: Careers
results.content:
Our Program Analysts work closely with our clients to elicit requirements, create system documentation, and provide support to their Project Manager. Our QA team focuses on manual testing and will support a variety of projects and clients.

Our full-stack web developers are exposed to all aspects of the solutions built, from the database to the client-side code and everything in between. The solutions developed are deployed to demanding cloud-based environments that require scalability, high availability, low-latency, discoverability, and accessibility.

  
   

Chainbridge Technologies' salaried employees regularly scheduled to work at least thirty (30) hours or more per week are eligible to participate in the following benefits: [...] Healthcare Plan
 Dental Insurance Plan
 Vacation leave
 Sick leave
 Life insurance
 Long-term disability
 Company paid holidays
 401(k) plan

  
   

For those employees working at the home office we offer:

 Social and team building events
 On-site gym and cafeteria
 Free coffee, tea, sodas and snacks
 Casual dress work environment
 Flexible work schedule
 Free parking

  
   

Chainbridge Technologies is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, or other characteristics protected by law.​​​

QA Position

PA Position

Developer Position [...] Chainbridge is Hiring Qualified Staff

Chainbridge Technologies, located in Vienna VA, is a leader in the federal emergency response space, providing web-based, line-of-business applications and systems integrations with a variety of tools and technologies. Utilizing an Agile development approach, our close-knit developer-centric team works in a highly collaborative, fast-paced environment that fosters skill and career growth.

We are currently hiring Program Analysts (PA), Quality Assurance Analysts (QA), and Junior and Mid-level Web Developers to support our growing company.

results.title: Defense Careers with Ironbridge Technologies, Inc.
results.content:
↓ Skip to Main Content

Ironbridge Technologies

# Careers

# Defense Careers

Interested in working with a leading edge IT company that offers mission critical work combined with an the stability and resources to ensure rapid career development?  If you are mission focused, highly skilled, high achieving and able to work in an integrated team environment with similarly motivated experts, we are interested in you. Ironbridge provides our employees defense career with the support required to deliver at the highest levels, while continuing to develop and reach their full personal and professional potential. [...] Ironbridge employees receive competitive compensation packages, in line with our expectation to hire and retain the best in the industry. A career with Ironbridge is not just a job. Our industry leading retention rate confirms our commitment to meeting—and surpassing—our employees’ career goals, both in the areas of professional development and for your private quality of life. We expect you to work hard in a challenging, fast paced and leading edge environment, and we offer professional training and advancement, as well as the commitment to your long-standing career growth supported by the best compensation package in the industry, to reward those expectations.  Must be a U.S. Citizen to qualify for employment.

Benefits include: [...] Responsibilities Include:  Ability to understand varying customer business processes and how technology enables those processes, Develop and Code applications, multi-tiered web and client server applications utilizing: C#, ASP.NET, XML, SQL, PL-SQL, JQuery, and JavaScript, Maintenance and Enhancement of Existing Applications, Development and QA Documentation, Tier 3 Product Support.

Required Skills:   OOP  (5+ years practical experience), Advanced Knowledge of .NET Framework 3.5/4.0, Proficiency with Web Services and Web Technologies, Expert Knowledge of C# (4+ Years), ASP.NET and IIS, Advanced Knowledge of SQL Server 2008, Advanced Knowledge of Windows OS and API’s, Experience with Visual Studio 2010, Excellent oral and written communication skills.
